attacking_style: Aggressive early race positioning, covering multiple breakaway attacks before launching decisive solo moves in final 1-2km when competition hesitates or fatigues.
team_tactics: Limited data, but appears to operate with autonomy in breakaways, relying on personal effort rather than team setup.
terrain_preference: Breakaway scenarios where exceptional recovery capacity allows bridging efforts without compromising finishing power. Exposed in pure climber battles or sprint finishes.
vulnerability: Insufficient data to identify clear vulnerabilities, though high energy expenditure early suggests potential weakness if breakaway fails to establish.
key_patterns: Exceptional within-race recovery: maintains freshness despite chasing multiple early attacks
Timing specialist: capitalizes on hesitation/fatigue in closing kilometers after aggressive positioning
Breakaway specialist: success comes from long-range efforts rather than bunch finishes
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation shows strong form with stage win, but insufficient data for trajectory assessment
